boundaries: A text match proves only that the quoted character sequence occurs in a selected local witness.
Manual form adjudication records abridgement, stitching, later commentary, editorial prose, and transcription variants without accepting a traditional interpretation or modern medical claim.
CText and Wikisource are public transcription witnesses used for character-level collation and attribution; they are not identified edition-level facsimiles.
nihaisha-nishi-tcm page cards are secondary locators only and cannot replace Shanghanlun or related classical witnesses.
Duplicate matches in Shanghanlun and Jingui Yaolue are retained as parallel textual witnesses, with Shanghanlun selected for this reference.
Raw Skill references and local source texts remain unchanged; corrections are overlays in adjudication and provenance data.
No quote, dose, treatment, diagnosis, prognosis, or self-care instruction becomes runtime eligible through this inventory.

checks.detail: Skill-level description of the reference file's scope, not wording from Shanghanlun.
Compresses 凡时行者 and 此非其时而有其气 from the same long passage into one clause.
The phrase is traceable to Ke Qin's later Shanghan Fuyi commentary, not to the body text of Shanghanlun.
The local file contains OCR placeholder A2K4A2K4. The CText witness supports 几几; the raw local file remains unchanged.
Abridges one sentence with an ellipsis; the first segment is too short for the automatic segmented matcher.
Abridges the dosing passage and omits 温服之 and intervening instructions; two local duplicate recensions preserve slightly different wording.
Combines 少腹鞕满, 血证谛, and 抵当汤主之 from related duplicate passages rather than quoting one continuous sentence.
A later summary of the Dachengqi Tang pattern. The local Fangjixue source explicitly attributes the four-character formulation to predecessors.
Combines the first local recension's 大猪胆汁 with the duplicate recension's omission of 及与, so it is not verbatim to either line.
Uses 此为瘀热在里 from one local recension and 身必发黄 from the duplicate recension.
The local file reads 身濈然汗出解也. CText and Wikisource support 身濈然汗出而解; the raw local file remains unchanged.
Abridges a longer passage; the opening segment 蚘厥者 is too short for the automatic segmented matcher.
Compiles seven separate prohibitions, omits words within several clauses, and normalizes the local 荣气 to 营气.
Combines the shorter wording of one duplicate recension with the omission pattern of the other.
The Nanjing passage reads 实实虚虚 and later 如此死者，医杀之耳; the reference reverses the paired phrase and stitches two clauses.
Skill-level workflow label, not wording from Shanghanlun or the declared related classics.
